title: Your friend! - Tequila arrives
description: Have you ever felt lonely in your Minecraft world? Have you tried to fill that void with countless pets and villagers, only to find their repetitive actions fail to provide true companionship? If so, this mod is for you!
body:
Have you ever felt lonely in your Minecraft world? Have you tried to fill that void with countless pets and villagers, only to find their repetitive actions fail to provide true companionship? If so, I completely understand. That’s why I decided to create a special 6mob that changes everything: **Tequila.**


![The silly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6414cc20ad4725e1a93d100a0b90cff4c9ce1eb7_0.webp)


# **Tequila’s Features:**

Once you craft Tequila, his unique personality begins to unfold. 

- ***Varied and well-timed dialogue:*** He has a wide range of dialogues that appear after long intervals, preventing you from feeling overwhelmed by his sounds and creating moments of _"perfect timing_".  
  Among his phrases, you’ll find simple responses like _"Yes, no, maybe"_, as well as clever jokes (like mimicking the sound of a creeper just before it explodes). He also occasionally compliments you or makes sounds like writing, coughing, playing cards, and more.  

- ***Intelligent following:*** If you hold an uncolored candle in your hand, Tequila will follow you, even over long distances. However, he won’t stick by your side all the time, making him more realistic. He’ll only accompany you when you _"ask him to"_.  

- ***Balanced temperament:*** Tequila is naturally calm, but if you attack him, he won’t hesitate to defend himself.  

- ***Magical abilities:*** Like any good wizard, he has some peculiar skills, such as the ability to glow in the dark. Also, he can throw amethysts to monsters, wich doesn't really make much damage, lol. This was done to prevent him from being another _"defense mob"_ instead of a friend.

# Crafting recipies: 

Tequila with _"typical"_ timed dialogues:

!["Normal" timed sounds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1add7f7673a3b856b2718f03228c8669ea73a5e3.png)

Tequila with random timed dialogues (recommended):

!["Random" timed sounds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5bd651836b4eabac1b32241f867a9ef0c7de4a0.png)

# :D


![Him](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c6a31f06af73db339a4a45d405f7d4d85cb62ab_0.webp)


Tequila isn’t just another mob; he’s a companion who brings life and personality to your Minecraft world. Ready to meet him?

One tip: Yes, you can craft more than just **ONE** Tequila, but it wouldn't be as inmersive, so, I recommend you to only have one :] 

You can use this mod as long as you give credits. 

Made with MCreator.
